set.body: Scope deferred out of v0.3.5 phase-b (parity doc §2 marker updated from in-b): the Francis/hqr2 kernel computes right eigenvectors only, so EigenVectors.Left/LeftAndRight currently return Left(UnsupportedOperation) on both eigNonsymmetric paths. Implement left eigenvectors: either extend the hqr2 back-substitution to the left problem (row eigenvectors of the quasi-triangular form transformed by Q, LAPACK dgeev-style) or solve Aᵀ right-eigenvectors and re-pair (must match the SAME eigenvalue ordering/packing as the right set). Convention to document: unit 2-norm, wᴴA = λwᴴ. Extend NonsymmetricEigenDecomposition producers (leftVectorsPacked is already plumbed) and the facades; parity-check against SciPy eig(left=True) semantics via Breeze if exposed, else fixed references.
